name: BMTC Group Inc.
summary: BMTC Group Inc., through its subsidiary, Ameublements Tanguay Inc., manages and operates a retail network of furniture, household appliances, and electronic products in Canada. The company operates through two divisions, Brault & Martineau and EconoMax. It operates retail outlets in 32 locations in Quebec province. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
